summary: A Department of Labor promotional piece narrated by a spoken voiceover ('Under President Trump's leadership, we are building a new golden age...') over corporate-style stock b-roll, intercut with a C-SPAN3 news feed of Acting Labor Secretary Keith Sonderling speaking at an investment summit. It is voiceover/speech-driven rather than a music-driven entertainment spectacle, and includes raw news-feed footage, so it falls outside the genre/music-video scope.
notable_text: KEITH SONDERLING Acting Labor Secretary; NATIONAL HARBOR, MD; INVESTMENT SUMMIT; C-SPAN3
